name: Aqua 4-in-1 Monterey Hammock Pool Float & Water Hammocks – 2-3-4 Multipacks – Multiple Colors/Styles – for Adults and Kids Floating
bullets: Two Pack: One Light Blue & One Navy/White Stripe
Effortless Use: No need for jumping, ladders, or flopping – simply sit and relax in the water with this easy-to-use pool floatie, and especially ideal for seniors and expectant mothers.
Exceptional Durability: Crafted from our patented non-stick PVC, this hammock is 50%-70% thicker than typical "sticky PVC" hammock pool floats. Comprising a blend of 50% soft vinyl and 50% soft mesh.
Versatile Float: Whether you're at the lake, ocean, or swimming pool, this floatie is perfect. Great for various activities, serving as an exercise saddle, chair, hammock, or a drifting platform.
Inflated Size: Enjoy our spacious aquatic comfort, measuring a generous 44 x 26 inches, perfect for people from 4 to 6 feet in height. Feel secure with a robust weight capacity of up to 250 pounds.
description: Aqua 4-in-1 Monterey Hammock Pool Float & Water Hammocks – 2-3-4 Multipacks – Multiple Colors/Styles – for Adults and Kids Floating

reviews.name: M H
reviews.title: Perfect Vacation Pool Float That Fits in Your Suitcase!
reviews.body: I bought this specifically to pack in my suitcase for a trip to the Caribbean, and it was one of the best vacation purchases I made! It inflates in just a couple of minutes, is incredibly lightweight, and barely takes up any luggage space. We tossed it in the rental boat, brought it to the beach, and used it by the pool every day. It's comfortable, easy to float on, and so convenient to carry…

reviews.name: chayden
reviews.title: Relaxing pool hammock float.
reviews.body: This has been a great addition to my pool. I can relax and float about while staying very cool as the hammock portion allows you to stay slightly in the water. Also works great as a “pool chair” if you prefer to sit up vs lay back. So far it has proven to be quite durable and color fast. Hangs easily when not in use.

reviews.name: AZ Customer
reviews.title: Great Seat For An Inflatable Spa
reviews.body: The only thing we don’t care for with an inflatable spa, also known as our personal cool pool, is that it has no seats like a traditional spa. You’re pretty much sitting on the ground if you want to soak. Or you can float and drift about from side to side. So we were looking for something to act as a seat and keep us off the bottom. We found many styles of pool chairs and floaties, but most are…

reviews.name: Mermaid
reviews.title: Sturdy and easier to pack than anything else I've found so far.
reviews.body: I ordered two of these - blue and orange. They're just the same except color.I removed one star because of the price... these are pretty pricey. I paid several dollars less for similar ones (different colors / pattern) at a local chain store and I found absolutely no difference in quality between these and those. They''re even the same brand and in the same box.But if you decide to purchase these…
